Package de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule.tacletbuilder

Class InfFlowBlockContractTacletBuilder

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.TermBuilder
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule.tacletbuilder.InfFlowBlockContractTacletBuilder
public final class InfFlowBlockContractTacletBuilder extends TermBuilder
Implements the rule which inserts operation contracts for a method call.

      public Term eqAtLocs(Services services, Term heap1, Term locset1, Term heap2, Term locset2)
      Get eqAtLocs function as a term.
      Parameters:
      services - the Services object.
      heap1 - the first heap term.
      locset1 - the first location set term.
      heap2 - the first heap term.
      locset2 - the first location set term.
      Returns:
      The eqAtLocs function term.

    • eqAtLocsPost

      public Term eqAtLocsPost(Services services, Term heap1Pre, Term heap1Post, Term locset1, Term heap2Pre, Term heap2Post, Term locset2)
      Get eqAtLocsPost function as a term.
      Parameters:
      services - the Services object.
      heap1Pre - the first pre-heap term.
      heap1Post - the first post-heap term.
      locset1 - the first location set term.
      heap2Pre - the second pre-heap term.
      heap2Post - the second post-heap term.
      locset2 - the second location set term.
      Returns:
      The eqAtLocsPost function term.
